article_title: Supabase Raises $500M Series F at $10.5 Billion Valuation as AI Agents Drive a Database Explosion
summary: Accurate Supabase Series F report; every claim, quote, number, and name verified verbatim against the three source snapshots. The sole automated warning is an allowlist note for two reputable primary/secondary outlets and does not warrant a correction.

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured News piece (525 words, within the News 400-1200 range). Clear Overview / What We Know / What We Don't Know / Analysis structure. Appropriate technical depth and a fair 'What We Don't Know' section flagging self-reported, unaudited metrics.
editor_notes.source_verification: Read all three gzipped snapshots from disk and verified every cited claim. source-0.html.gz (prnewswire, the press release, status 200): confirms $500M Series F at $10.5B post-money, GIC lead with verbatim investor list (Accel, Y Combinator, Craft, Felicis, Peak XV, Coatue), 600% YoY database increase, 250,000 customers, 'Claude Code is the largest contributor since the start of the year', 370% Supabase-for-Platforms growth, Multigres as 'an open source scaling layer for Postgres' (verbatim — the exact phrase appears in the release), and the boilerplate 'The majority of AI app builders and more than 9 million developers use Supabase.' source-1.html.gz (supabase.com blog, status 200): confirms Stripe second investment, Georgian and Salesforce Ventures as new investors, 60%+ of new databases launched by AI tools, and the verbatim fragment 'as Claude Code and Codex expand the number of people who can build.' source-2.html.gz (technode.global, status 200): confirms the $500M/$10.5B framing, GIC lead, seven months after Series E, >$1B total, founded 2020, and the AI-coding-agent demand framing.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All claims supported. The Copplestone quote 'Demand for Supabase is exploding...Agents are now deploying the majority of databases on our platform' is verbatim from the press release; the ellipsis honestly elides the middle two sentences and the attributed title 'Co-founder and CEO of Supabase' matches the release exactly. The '9 million developers' figure is attributed correctly and exclusively to the press release, which carries that exact wording ('more than 9 million developers'); the blog phrases it differently ('Nearly 10 million developers') and the article correctly does NOT use the blog for that number. No hallucinations detected.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Self-reported metrics are explicitly framed as company claims; the Analysis section raises a valuation question without editorializing.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Supabase funding coverage in the archive. Distinct from recent funding pieces (Ramp, Mercury, Cognition). New topic.
concerns: Two cited sources are not in config/source_allowlist.txt: supabase.com and technode.global. supabase.com is the company's own primary announcement of its own funding round (inherently authoritative for these facts); technode.global is the global edition of TechNode, whose .com domain is allowlisted. Neither raises a factual-accuracy concern and the corroborating prnewswire source is allowlisted, so no corrections record is warranted.
recommendations: Consider adding supabase.com and technode.global to config/source_allowlist.txt as trusted domains.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: High-quality, accurately sourced submission ready for publication. Verdict upgraded from the script's auto APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS (triggered only by the allowlist warning) to APPROVE after full source verification confirmed no content errors requiring a public correction.

content_preview.title: Supabase Raises $500M Series F at $10.5 Billion Valuation as AI Agents Drive a Database Explosion
content_preview.summary: The open-source Postgres platform raised $500M led by GIC just seven months after its Series E, citing 600% database growth driven by AI coding agents.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Supabase, the open-source platform built on the Postgres database, has raised a $500 million Series F at a $10.5 billion post-money valuation, according to the company's [press release](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/supabase-raises-500m-at-10-5b-to-accelerate-lead-in-agentic-infrastructure-302791787.html). The round comes just seven months after the company's Series E and brings its total capital raised to over $1 billion. Supabase, which was founded in 2020, frames the n...

recommendations: Before merging, the human reviewer should write a corrections file at src/content/corrections/<YYYY-MM>/<article-slug>.json documenting the warning(s).
Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt
